recommendations.title: School's Out
recommendations.overview: A few days before the baccalaureate, a high school student decides to settle accounts with the most cowardly teacher in the school.

recommendations.title: Lessons of a Dream
recommendations.overview: An English teacher brings soccer to a German school in the 19th Century.

recommendations.title: Oh Lucy!
recommendations.overview: A lonely, chain-smoking office lady in Tokyo falls for her teacher when she decides to take English lessons. When her teacher disappears, she sets out on a journey to find him.

recommendations.title: The Knight Before Christmas
recommendations.overview: A medieval English knight is magically transported to present day where he ends up falling for a high school science teacher.

recommendations.title: I Love You in All Languages of the World
recommendations.overview: A divorced high school PE teacher falls in love with a single mom before learning that her daughter is the student who's been hitting on him between classes.

recommendations.title: Chemical Hearts
recommendations.overview: When a hopelessly romantic high school senior falls for a mysterious new classmate, it sets them both on an unexpected journey that teaches them about love, loss, and most importantly themselves.

recommendations.title: Never Been Kissed
recommendations.overview: Josie Geller, a baby-faced junior copywriter at the Chicago Sun-Times, must pose as a student at her former high school to research contemporary teenage culture. With the help of her brother, Rob, Josie infiltrates the inner circle of the most popula

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Kabir Singh
recommendations.overview: Kabir, a genius yet hostile medical student, falls in love with Preeti from his college. When Preeti's father spots the couple kissing, he opposes their relationship and decides to marry her off.

recommendations.title: Candy
recommendations.overview: A poet falls in love with an art student, who gravitates to his bohemian lifestyle — and his love of heroin. Hooked as much on one another as they are on the drug, their relationship alternates between states of oblivion, self-destruction, and despai
